name: Kahlua Fantasy Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chocolate crumb crust: Press firmly into a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. In a saucepan over medium heat, melt chocolate with Kahlua and butter until smooth. Set aside.
4. In a bowl, combine beaten eggs, sugar, and salt. Add sour cream; blend well.
5. Add cream cheese to the egg mixture and beat until smooth.
6. Gradually blend in the chocolate mixture.
7. Pour into the prepared crust.
8. Bake for 35 minutes or until the filling is barely set in the center.
9. Turn off heat, let stand in the oven with the door open for 15 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool at room temperature for 1 hour.
11. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight. Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate shavings if desired.
